name: Victrex PLC
description: World leader in high-performance PEEK polymer solutions for aerospace, automotive, medical and industrial markets. Net debt £25m, 87m shares, dividend 59.56p maintained but cover only 0.7x.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £293m in FY2025 (+1%). PEEK demand across aerospace, automotive (EV 800V), medical, electronics. Addressable market 5x current levels. China facility ramping. Volumes +12% but ASP -10% on mix/FX.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying operating margin 16.5% in FY2025 (down from 20.7%). China plant start-up losses £8m, FX headwinds £8m. Profit Improvement Plan targeting £10m+ savings by FY2027.
assumptions.risks: Medical Spine declining (PEEK→titanium shift). China ramp-up losses. FX exposure. Asian PEEK competition. Dividend 59.56p uncovered (0.7x underlying EPS). Net debt rising.
assumptions.catalyst: Magma mega-programme (PEEK pipe for deepwater), Profit Improvement Plan, PEEK Knee clinical trials, China volume ramp, aerospace composites.
